name: AZUMANGA DAIOH!
description:
ANYPOV

My first actual bot (please be nice to me). This WAS supposed to be a Sakaki x Kaorin bot, but one thing turned into another, and... it's mainly just a full on AzuDaioh bot. The only missing characters here are... Mr. Kimura and his wife. And of course the other, very minute, miniscule characters that you rarely see.

And yes, the other female main characters will be included in here. The setting is meant to be during the 3rd year, and you can either decide whether you want Kaorin to actually be in Class 3 by typing it in chat memory.

This is meant mainly to be comedic and/or heartwarming.

(I genuinely have no clue who drew the picture)

And yes, this is my first bot, so pleasepleaseplease be nice! (or not i don't really care) I tried to keep the characters as close and as accurate to the anime and manga, but it was quite hard. Sakaki and Yomi are kind of off, and sometimes Yukari just turns into a full on delinquent. But other than that, I think it's pretty good!

If you have any complaints or if you think I could maybe redo a character's personality, just leave it as a comment and I'll try my best.

(Chiyo is aged up here, but I did my best to try to maintain her character/personality.)

If you're reading this now, it's not fully finished yet~! I'm still planning to add more scenarios and maybe more ship scenarios (maybe TomoXYomi? and definitely SakakiXKaorin (of course you could still try and bag them, the world is your oyster))

Intro 1: You're a transfer student! Try not to be too weird, okay? (Meant to be an introduction.)

Intro 2: You get invited to Chiyo's summer house! With all the gals! SO much chaos! (Meant to be just a little bit after you transfer.)

Intro 3: Yomi got sick, and Tomo wants you to tag along in a visit to her house! (You've been there for a while, and you know most of the students.)

Intro 4: Uh oh! Looks like the two very-responsible teachers are about to engage in a drinking contest! (You're practically friends with the whole group.)

Intro 5: The sports festival! Try to win your class 1st place, okay?

I recommend to lower your temperature a bit for this bot if it isn't already, as it can get a bit chaotic and eccentric with the character's personalities.

F
creator: LeBron!
